ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "loyalty_tier" TEXT /* Loyalty tier of the customer (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_tier FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_tier") REFERENCES loyalty_tiers ("tier_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the transaction (e.g., 1 for the first transaction by the customer) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage applied to the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the transaction was made (e.g., in-store, online, mobile app) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction (e.g., credit card, cash, etc.) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_discount_percentage FOREIGN KEY ("discount_percentage") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_percentage"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount offer */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code that can be used by customers */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the discount validity */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the discount validity */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount, etc.) */,
  "min_purchase_amount" TEXT /* Minimum purchase amount required to apply the discount */,
  "max_discount_amount" TEXT /* Maximum discount amount that can be applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_tiers" (
  "loyalty_tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty tier */,
  "threshold_amount" TEXT /* Threshold amount required to qualify for the tier */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits associated with the loyalty tier */,
  "min_points_required" INTEGER /* Minimum points required to achieve the loyalty tier */,
  "max_points_required" INTEGER /* Maximum points required to achieve the loyalty tier */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the points expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
